def negative_response_envelope_shape_inconsistent_across_siblings_in_same_router():
    rule_id = "response_envelope_shape_inconsistent_across_siblings_in_same_router"
    family = "observability"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Response envelope shape inconsistent across sibling endpoints in the same router file."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
